blocking_reason: distribution_recoverability.json classification = NOT_RECOVERABLE. PSIG-001 and PSIG-002 statistical recompute is not possible from available BlueEdge evidence. Per contract stopping rule: statistical recompute halted. BI-02 remains unresolved.

PSIG-001.reason: Population of 4 CEU-pair relation_counts [3,1,1,1] insufficient. Outlier score=1.73 below threshold=2.0. FastAPI score=9.43 not reproducible from CEU-level coupling evidence.

PSIG-002.reason: Uniform zone activation (7/7=1.0) — zero variance. No statistical distribution to compute outlier score from.

PSIG-004.reason: Approximate recompute is arithmetically possible (outlier score ≈2.355-3.33 from per-zone node coverage distribution). However: (a) numeric value differs from FastAPI reference 4.33; (b) PSIG-001 and PSIG-002 are blocked making the overall signal_projection artifact incomplete; (c) report generators expecting PSIG-001/002 in statistical scale will produce incorrect characterizations even if PSIG-004 is approximate.

PSIG-006.reason: Direct count = 0. No statistical computation required. Exact match with FastAPI expected value.

fabrication_rule: Per RULE-07: values not recovered are BLOCKED, not fabricated. signal_projection_fastapi_compatible.json will NOT be produced.

downstream_impact.tier2_report: BLOCKED — primary coupling signal characterization (PSIG-001, PSIG-002) unavailable
